meta_data.buildkite:git:commit:
commit d7a5fedc21a749669fb2d86f78d9a552ad064bab
Author:     Geoffrey <geoffrey@sourcegraph.com>
AuthorDate: Wed Jul 1 14:47:31 2026 +0000
Commit:     Geoffrey <geoffrey@sourcegraph.com>
CommitDate: Wed Jul 1 14:47:31 2026 +0000

    Fix for CI failure on go-fix-modernize--270b1737-ed47-45a7-86f7-80feb79e95f9

jobs.name: :pipeline:
jobs.command: buildkite-agent pipeline upload

jobs.name: :golang: Lint
jobs.command:
mise install go golangci-lint
eval "$(mise env)"
go mod tidy
if [ -n "$(git status --porcelain)" ]; then
  echo "Unstaged files after go mod tidy:"
  git status --porcelain
  echo "Run 'go mod tidy' and commit the changes"
  exit 1
fi
golangci-lint run --timeout=30m

jobs.name: :golang: Test
jobs.command:
mise install go
eval "$(mise env)"
go test -shuffle=on -v -race ./...

jobs.name: :pipeline: Upload service pipelines
jobs.command: find .buildkite/pipelines -type f \( -iname '*.yml' -o -iname '*.yaml' \) -print0 | xargs -0 -n1 buildkite-agent pipeline upload --git-diff-base HEAD~1

jobs.command: find .buildkite/pipelines -type f \( -iname '*.yml' -o -iname '*.yaml' \) -print0 | xargs -0 -n1 buildkite-agent pipeline upload --git-diff-base HEAD~1

jobs.name: :pipeline:
jobs.command: buildkite-agent pipeline upload

jobs.name: :golang: Lint
jobs.command:
mise install go golangci-lint
eval "$(mise env)"
go mod tidy
if [ -n "$(git status --porcelain)" ]; then
  echo "Unstaged files after go mod tidy:"
  git status --porcelain
  echo "Run 'go mod tidy' and commit the changes"
  exit 1
fi
golangci-lint run --timeout=30m
